title: Extended: humanOversightSummary (v0.1)
description: Audience-neutral summary of human oversight actions (approvals, interventions, reviews, escalations) that occurred within the Pack's scope. Particularly relevant for regulatory frameworks that mandate human oversight of high-risk AI systems (EU AI Act Article 14, NIST AI RMF Govern functions, etc.). The taxonomy of oversight types and outcomes is OPEN. Carried under the Pack envelope's 'extended.humanOversightSummary' field.

period.description: Period this summary covers. SHOULD equal or be a subset of extended.scope.timeWindow.

total.description: Total number of human oversight actions in the period. Zero is meaningful but ambiguous: it may indicate fully autonomous operation, or it may indicate missing oversight where oversight was expected. The audit interpretation depends on context (subject type, riskClassification, controlAttestations).

byType.description: Counts keyed by oversight action type. Open keys. Conventional: 'approval', 'intervention', 'review', 'escalation'.

byOutcome.description: Counts keyed by outcome. Open keys. Conventional: 'approved', 'denied', 'modified', 'no_action'.

events.description: Individual oversight action records. Open shape per item. Conventional fields: 'id', 'type', 'occurredAt', 'actor' (who performed the oversight — open shape; may be human, automation, committee), 'subject' (what was overseen, e.g. an eventId or runId), 'outcome', 'summary', 'eventRefs' (eventIds in this Pack that document the triggering events).
